purpose: Bind a Qianlima business conclusion to state, diff, sources, formulas, version, and verification metadata.
invariants: A business conclusion is not complete without source references, time range, formula references, and verification status.
Evidence packs contain references and summaries, never raw private rows or secrets.
A producer cannot mark its own pack independently verified.
Artifact hash covers the immutable pack artifact, not the source data.
A replacement pack gets a new evidence_pack_id and preserves the prior reference.
